product: Expanded region availability for Databricks Apps
tagline: Databricks Apps now available in the following regions: ap northeast 2 ap south 1 See Features with limited regional availability
what_it_does: Databricks Apps now available in the following regions: ap northeast 2 ap south 1 See Features with limited regional availability This article lists features with availability differences by region. note Some features are not included in the tables below. These features, known as Designated Services, use Databricks Geos to manage data residency when processing customer content.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
